payload.name: apply_patch
payload.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: work/check-after-reboot.ps1
+$ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'
+[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)
+$OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)
+
+$root = Split-Path -Parent $PSScriptRoot
+$outDir = Join-Path $root 'outputs'
+New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
+$report = Join-Path $outDir 'after-reboot-check.txt'
+
+function Add-Line {
+    param([string]$Text = '')
+    $Text | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append
+}
+
+if (Test-Path $report) { Remove-Item $report -Force }
+
+Add-Line "After reboot check"
+Add-Line "Time: $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')"
+Add-Line ''
+
+Add-Line '== Lock screen Windows Spotlight registry =='
+$lockReg = 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Lock Screen'
+$cdmReg = 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\ContentDeliveryManager'
+Get-ItemProperty $lockReg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LockAppAumId, SlideshowEnabled, LockInstanceType | Format-List | Out-String | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append
+Get-ItemProperty $cdmReg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ContentDeliveryAllowed, RotatingLockScreenEnabled, RotatingLockScreenOverlayEnabled, FeatureManagementEnabled | Format-List | Out-String | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append
+
+Add-Line '== ContentDeliveryManager assets =='
+$assets = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Packages\Microsoft.Windows.ContentDeliveryManager_cw5n1h2txyewy\LocalState\Assets"
+$settings = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Packages\Microsoft.Windows.ContentDeliveryManager_cw5n1h2txyewy\Settings"
+[pscustomobject]@{
+    AssetsExists = Test-Path $assets
+    AssetsCount = if (Test-Path $assets) { (Get-ChildItem $assets -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object).Count } else { -1 }
+    LargeAssets = if (Test-Path $assets) { (Get-ChildItem $assets -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object Length -gt 100KB | Measure-Object).Count } else { -1 }
+    SettingsExists = Test-Path $settings
+    SettingsFiles = if (Test-Path $settings) { ((Get-ChildItem $settings -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name) -join ', ') } else { '<missing>' }
+} | Format-List | Out-String | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append
+
+Add-Line '== CloudStore recent events =='
+Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Microsoft-Windows-CloudStore/Operational'; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddHours(-2)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue |
+    Select-Object -First 20 TimeCreated, Id, LevelDisplayName, Message |
+    Format-List | Out-String -Width 220 | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append
+
+Add-Line '== Defender scan events =='
+Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Microsoft-Windows-Windows Defender/Operational'; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddHours(-6)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue |
+    Where-Object { $_.Id -in 1000,1001,1002,1005,1116,1117,5007,5013 } |
+    Select-Object -First 40 TimeCreated, Id, LevelDisplayName, Message |
+    Format-List | Out-String -Width 220 | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append
+
+Add-Line '== Device errors =='
+Get-PnpDevice -PresentOnly | Where-Object { $_.Status -ne 'OK' } | Select-Object Status, Class, FriendlyName, InstanceId, Problem, ConfigManagerErrorCode | Format-List | Out-String -Width 220 | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append
+
+Add-Line "Report: $report"
*** End Patch

payload.stdout:
Success. Updated the following files:
A work/check-after-reboot.ps1

C:\\Users\\KSR\\Documents\\Codex\\2026-0.content:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'
[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)
$OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)

$root = Split-Path -Parent $PSScriptRoot
$outDir = Join-Path $root 'outputs'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir | Out-Null
$report = Join-Path $outDir 'after-reboot-check.txt'

function Add-Line {
    param([string]$Text = '')
    $Text | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append
}

if (Test-Path $report) { Remove-Item $report -Force }

Add-Line "After reboot check"
Add-Line "Time: $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')"
Add-Line ''

Add-Line '== Lock screen Windows Spotlight registry =='
$lockReg = 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Lock Screen'
$cdmReg = 'HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\ContentDeliveryManager'
Get-ItemProperty $lockReg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LockAppAumId, SlideshowEnabled, LockInstanceType | Format-List | Out-String | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append
Get-ItemProperty $cdmReg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object ContentDeliveryAllowed, RotatingLockScreenEnabled, RotatingLockScreenOverlayEnabled, FeatureManagementEnabled | Format-List | Out-String | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append

Add-Line '== ContentDeliveryManager assets =='
$assets = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Packages\Microsoft.Windows.ContentDeliveryManager_cw5n1h2txyewy\LocalState\Assets"
$settings = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Packages\Microsoft.Windows.ContentDeliveryManager_cw5n1h2txyewy\Settings"
[pscustomobject]@{
    AssetsExists = Test-Path $assets
    AssetsCount = if (Test-Path $assets) { (Get-ChildItem $assets -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object).Count } else { -1 }
    LargeAssets = if (Test-Path $assets) { (Get-ChildItem $assets -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object Length -gt 100KB | Measure-Object).Count } else { -1 }
    SettingsExists = Test-Path $settings
    SettingsFiles = if (Test-Path $settings) { ((Get-ChildItem $settings -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name) -join ', ') } else { '<missing>' }
} | Format-List | Out-String | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append

Add-Line '== CloudStore recent events =='
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Microsoft-Windows-CloudStore/Operational'; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddHours(-2)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue |
    Select-Object -First 20 TimeCreated, Id, LevelDisplayName, Message |
    Format-List | Out-String -Width 220 | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append

Add-Line '== Defender scan events =='
Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Microsoft-Windows-Windows Defender/Operational'; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddHours(-6)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue |
    Where-Object { $_.Id -in 1000,1001,1002,1005,1116,1117,5007,5013 } |
    Select-Object -First 40 TimeCreated, Id, LevelDisplayName, Message |
    Format-List | Out-String -Width 220 | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append

Add-Line '== Device errors =='
Get-PnpDevice -PresentOnly | Where-Object { $_.Status -ne 'OK' } | Select-Object Status, Class, FriendlyName, InstanceId, Problem, ConfigManagerErrorCode | Format-List | Out-String -Width 220 | Tee-Object -FilePath $report -Append

Add-Line "Report: $report"

payload.message:
연구원님, 현재 점검/복구 1차는 완료했습니다. 핵심 결과입니다.

1. 프로필 이전 꼬임
- Windows 프로필 등록은 정상입니다. `KSR`만 일반 사용자로 남아 있고 `final` 프로필 레지스트리 항목은 없습니다.
- 예약 작업/시작 프로그램/HKCU 레지스트리에서 `C:\Users\final` 실사용 참조는 발견되지 않았습니다.
- 남은 `final` 문자열은 대부분 예전 Codex 로그/스크립트와 최근 사용 기록입니다.

2. 실제로 수정한 문제
- Defender에 남아 있던 위험한 예외를 제거했습니다:
  - `C:\Users\final\Downloads\AddExclusionPathPS\`
  - `C:\Windows\KMSAutoS`
  - `C:\Windows\KMS`
  - `C:\Windows\AAct_Tools\AAct_files\KMSSS.exe`
- `GamingServices` 오류는 복구되어 현재 실행 중입니다.
- 잠금화면 Windows 추천 값은 다시 정상값으로 고정했습니다:
  - `LockAppAumId = Microsoft.LockApp...WindowsDefaultLockScreen`
  - `SlideshowEnabled = 0`
  - `LockInstanceType = 3`

3. 시스템 검사 결과
- DISM Check/Scan/Restore: 정상 완료
- SFC: 정상 완료
- C: 드라이브 온라인 검사: 문제 없음
- 디스크 건강 상태: 전체 Healthy
- Defender 전체 검사는 2026-06-03 13:37:27에 시작 이벤트가 확인됐고, 아직 완료 이벤트는 없습니다. PC가 사용 중이면 “유휴 시 검사”로 천천히 진행될 수 있습니다.

4. 남은 문제
- `Realtek Bluetooth 5.0 Adapter`는 재시작해도 오류가 유지됩니다. Intel Bluetooth는 정상이라, 이건 별도 Realtek USB Bluetooth 동글/드라이버 문제로 보입니다.
- 잠금화면 Windows 추천 이미지 저장소는 아직 `0개`입니다. 설정값은 정상이라, 이제 재부팅 후 CloudStore/ContentDeliveryManager가 다시 내려받는지 확인해야 합니다.

다음은 **재부팅**이 필요합니다. 재부팅 후 로그인해서 2~3분 기다린 다음 `Win + L`로 잠금화면을 한 번 띄워 주세요. 이후 “재부팅 완료”라고 말씀해 주시면 제가 바로 `check-after-reboot.ps1`로 Windows 추천 이미지 다운로드, CloudStore 오류, Defender 검사 완료 여부까지 이어서 검증하겠습니다.

settings.developer_instructions:
# Collaboration Mode: Default

You are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.

Your active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.

## request_user_input availability

Use the `request_user_input` tool only when it is listed in the available tools for this turn.

In Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.

payload.name: apply_patch
payload.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: work/fix-settingsync-cloudstore-policy-admin.ps1
+$ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'
+[Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)
+$OutputEncoding = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)
+
+$root = Split-Path -Parent $PSScriptRoot
+$outDir = Join-Path $root 'outputs'
+$backupDir = Join-Path $PSScriptRoot ("settingsync-policy-backup-" + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss'))
+New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $outDir, $backupDir | Out-Null
+$log = Join-Path $outDir 'settingsync-cloudstore-policy-fix.log'
+
+function Write-Log {
+    param([string]$Message)
+    $line = "[{0}] {1}" -f (Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'), $Message
+    $line | Tee-Object -FilePath $log -Append
+}
+
+function Is-Admin {
+    $principal = New-Object Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal([Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent())
+    return $principal.IsInRole([Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltInRole]::Administrator)
+}
+
+Write-Log 'Starting SettingSync/CloudStore policy fix'
+if (-not (Is-Admin)) {
+    Write-Log 'Administrator rights required'
+    exit 740
+}
+
+$policyKey = 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\SettingSync'
+$policyReg = 'HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\SettingSync'
+if (Test-Path $policyKey) {
+    $backupFile = Join-Path $backupDir 'HKLM-SettingSync.reg'
+    reg.exe export $policyReg $backupFile /y | Out-Null
+    Write-Log "Backed up SettingSync policy to $backupFile"
+    $before = Get-ItemProperty $policyKey | Select-Object * -ExcludeProperty PSPath,PSParentPath,PSChildName,PSDrive,PSProvider
+    Write-Log "Before: $(($before | Format-List | Out-String).Trim())"
+    Remove-Item $policyKey -Recurse -Force
+    Write-Log 'Removed HKLM SettingSync policy key'
+} else {
+    Write-Log 'No HKLM SettingSync policy key found'
+}
+
+$sid = (Get-CimInstance Win32_UserAccount -Filter "Name='KSR'").SID
+$userBase = "Registry::HKEY_USERS\$sid\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion"
+$lockReg = Join-Path $userBase 'Lock Screen'
+$cdmReg = Join-Path $userBase 'ContentDeliveryManager'
+New-Item -Path $lockReg -Force | Out-Null
+New-Item -Path $cdmReg -Force | Out-Null
+New-ItemProperty -Path $lockReg -Name 'LockAppAumId' -Value 'Microsoft.LockApp_cw5n1h2txyewy!WindowsDefaultLockScreen' -PropertyType String -Force | Out-Null
+New-ItemProperty -Path $lockReg -Name 'SlideshowEnabled' -Value 0 -PropertyType DWord -Force | Out-Null
+New-ItemProperty -Path $lockReg -Name 'LockInstanceType' -Value 3 -PropertyType DWord -Force | Out-Null
+
+$values = @{
+    ContentDeliveryAllowed = 1
+    FeatureManagementEnabled = 1
+    RotatingLockScreenEnabled = 1
+    RotatingLockScreenOverlayEnabled = 1
+    'SubscribedContent-338387Enabled' = 1
+    'SubscribedContent-338388Enabled' = 1
+    'SubscribedContent-338389Enabled' = 1
+    'SubscribedContent-353694Enabled' = 1
+    'SubscribedContent-353696Enabled' = 1
+    SystemPaneSuggestionsEnabled = 1
+    SoftLandingEnabled = 1
+}
+foreach ($entry in $values.GetEnumerator()) {
+    New-ItemProperty -Path $cdmReg -Name $entry.Key -Value $entry.Value -PropertyType DWord -Force | Out-Null
+}
+Write-Log 'Re-applied lock screen Windows Spotlight values'
+
+foreach ($svc in 'wlidsvc','TokenBroker','InstallService','CDPUserSvc','OneSyncSvc','WpnUserService') {
+    Get-Service | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq $svc -or $_.Name -like "$svc*" } | ForEach-Object {
+        try {
+            if ($_.Status -ne 'Running') { Start-Service -Name $_.Name -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
+            Write-Log "Service $($_.Name): $((Get-Service -Name $_.Name).Status)"
+        } catch {
+            Write-Log "Service start failed $($_.Name): $($_.Exception.Message)"
+        }
+    }
+}
+
+foreach ($proc in 'backgroundTaskHost','RuntimeBroker','StartMenuExperienceHost','ShellExperienceHost') {
+    Get-Process -Name $proc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
+}
+Start-Sleep -Seconds 3
+Start-Process explorer.exe
+Start-Process 'ms-settings:lockscreen'
+
+Write-Log 'Opened lock screen settings and restarted shell-related processes'
+Write-Log "Backup folder: $backupDir"
+Write-Log 'A sign-out or reboot may be required for policy removal to fully apply.'
*** End Patch

payload.message:
연구원님, 재부팅 후 점검에서 결정적인 원인을 하나 더 찾고 수정했습니다.

문제였던 항목은 `HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\SettingSync`의 설정 동기화 차단 정책입니다. 이 정책 때문에 CloudStore가 계속 `0x80040105`로 실패했고, 잠금화면 Windows 추천 값도 부팅 후 다시 흔들린 것으로 보입니다.

제가 처리한 내용:
- 해당 `SettingSync` 정책을 백업 후 제거했습니다.
- 로컬 그룹 정책 파일에 재주입 흔적이 없는 것도 확인했습니다.
- `gpupdate` 후에도 정책이 다시 생기지 않는 것 확인했습니다.
- 잠금화면 Windows 추천 값은 현재 정상입니다: `LockInstanceType = 3`
- 정책 제거 후 새 CloudStore 오류는 아직 발생하지 않았습니다.
- Defender 전체 검사는 `14:23:24`에 다시 시작 이벤트가 찍혔습니다.

현재 남은 확인은 하나입니다. **한 번 더 재부팅**해 주세요. 이번 재부팅은 방금 제거한 설정 동기화 정책이 완전히 빠진 상태로 Windows가 CloudStore와 잠금화면 추천을 다시 잡는지 확인하기 위한 재부팅입니다.

재부팅 후 로그인해서 2~3분 기다린 다음 `Win + L`로 잠금화면을 한 번 띄워 주세요. 그 뒤 “재부팅 완료”라고 말씀해 주시면 제가 바로 최종 확인하겠습니다.

재부팅 후 로그인해서 2~3분 기다린 다음 `Win + L`로 잠금화면을 한 번 띄워 주세요. 그 뒤 “재부팅 완료”라고 말씀해 주시면 제가 바로 최종 확인하겠습니다.
